title: Local conservancy chair attends international workshop
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Great Brak River...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Great Brak River Conservancy’s chairperson, Scott Thomson, recently attended a workshop in George held by the Interdisciplinary Centre for Conservation Science (ICCS), an academic research group from the University of Oxford’s biology department.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Great Brak River Conservancy’s chairperson, Scott Thomson, recently attended a workshop in George held by the Interdisciplinary Centre for Conservation Science (ICCS), an academic research group from the University of Oxford’s biology department."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The ICCS hosts the Interdisciplinary Conservation Network (ICN) each year, providing researchers with an opportunity to hone their skills and build networks."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This year’s ICN was held at the George Campus of the Nelson Mandela University and the Wilderness Hotel between 6 and 10 October.","html":"This year’s ICN was held at the George Campus of the Nelson Mandela University and the Wilderness Hotel between 6 and 10 October."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thomson said he was invited to attend along with researchers from across the globe who all spoke on various topics over the four days.","html":"Thomson said he was invited to attend along with researchers from across the globe who all spoke on various topics over the four days."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to the ICCS’s website, the ICN focused on three different research themes.","html":"According to the ICCS’s website, the ICN focused on three different research themes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The first theme was advancing inclusive conservation through intersectionality and interdisciplinary research, and that “the biodiversity crisis demands interdisciplinary research addressing the complex socio-ecological dynamics of conservation challenges and how to address them”.","html":"The first theme was advancing inclusive conservation through intersectionality and interdisciplinary research, and that “the biodiversity crisis demands interdisciplinary research addressing the complex socio-ecological dynamics of conservation challenges and how to address them”."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The second theme looked at navigating conflicts in area-based conservation.","html":"The second theme looked at navigating conflicts in area-based conservation. "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The second theme looked at navigating conflicts in area-based conservation, which, according to the ICCS’s website, sought to critically examine the “multiple dimensions of conflicts in area-based conservation: from the politics of territory and access to the lived experiences of communities on the ground”.","html":"The second theme looked at navigating conflicts in area-based conservation, which, according to the ICCS’s website, sought to critically examine the “multiple dimensions of conflicts in area-based conservation: from the politics of territory and access to the lived experiences of communities on the ground”."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The final theme was just conservation: reimagining equity, diversity and inclusion in conservation careers. This is the topic on which Thomson was one of the speakers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He said he also spoke about how people on the ground can give input into conservation research.","html":"He said he also spoke about how people on the ground can give input into conservation research."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He added that the Great Brak River Conservancy was also able to lead its ICN group on the Wolwedans Dam Trail for an outdoor activity.","html":"He added that the Great Brak River Conservancy was also able to lead its ICN group on the Wolwedans Dam Trail for an outdoor activity."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"To read more about the ICN and its themes, visit its website.","html":"To read more about the ICN and its themes, visit its website."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
